prompt: Create a wide JRPG fantasy title logo splash screen for Hatsune Miku. Canvas: 16:9 horizontal white background, clean high-key presentation with no border. Main composition: huge ornate serif fantasy logo centered-left reading HATSUNE MIKU, arranged on two lines with “HATSUNE” above “MIKU”; use metallic teal-to-white gradient letters, beveled 3D edges, sharp Gothic serifs, bright star glints, thin gold outlines, and subtle drop shadows. Add a small Japanese subtitle centered under the logo reading 初音ミク, flanked by tiny decorative sparkle ornaments. Character silhouette: on the right side, place a dark teal anime idol silhouette of Hatsune Miku in profile facing left, showing exactly 2 very long twin-tails flowing dramatically to the right and downward, with exactly 2 rectangular hair accessories accented in pink and cyan. Background fantasy elements: behind the logo add a pale gold circular magic crest with compass-like spokes and one tall spear-shaped ornament rising above the title; on the far right behind the silhouette add a distant dark teal Gothic castle skyline with multiple pointed towers. Decorative elements: add sweeping translucent aqua brushstroke waves curling around the logo and character, especially one large crescent stroke on the left and several ribbon-like hair/water strokes on the lower right; scatter small star sparkles, paint splashes, and a few pink petal-like fragments. Include a small magenta number 01 near the lower right of the main logo. Visual style: elegant Japanese fantasy RPG key art, logo design focus, crisp vector-like typography mixed with watercolor splashes, luminous cyan and teal palette with pale gold accents, high detail, polished game-title presentation. Constraints: use exactly one character silhouette, one main two-line title, one Japanese subtitle, and one edition number; keep the background mostly white and uncluttered; no extra logos, no watermark, no frame.
